name: Path Equivalence: 'fakedir/../realdir/filename'
description: The product restricts access to 'realdir/filename' but does not handle the equivalent path 'fakedir/../realdir/filename', where prepending a fake directory followed by traversal resolves to the same restricted file and bypasses the protection.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path in the form 'fakedir/../realdir/filename' that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] matching against 'realdir/filename' because the check doesn't canonicalize before comparison, while the OS resolves the traversal to the restricted path at STORAGE[file_access]
